_capture_metadata.purpose: Frozen list of all picklist values configured for the Mass_Email_Clients field on Contacts. Sequence 3 ('Important Update Regarding Promotions') is the trigger value for the 16 Oct 2025 mailout.

field._critical_note: history_tracking_enabled is FALSE — there is no audit trail of changes to this field. This is why field-state queries alone cannot reconstruct the Oct 16 cohort and why the FCA Update Promo tag (which is durable and accumulates) is the authoritative reconstruction source.

pick_list_values._note: **The Oct 16 2025 campaign trigger value.** Setting this on a Contact fires sequence 2 of workflow rule 794088000139471721, which sends the email and applies the FCA Update Promo tag.

pick_list_values.actual_value: FCA Update Regarding The Redress Scheme
pick_list_values.display_value: Redress Scheme Update With Claim Overview

pick_list_values.actual_value: Fair Motor Complaints - Happy New Year

_runtime_values_observed_in_data_but_not._note: Set by the Mass Email Promotion Update Via ZeptoMail Deluge function (and equivalent functions for other campaigns) on successful ZeptoMail API response (EM_104). Cumulative across ALL campaigns since Oct 2025 — not specific to the Oct 16 send. NOT a defined picklist value but persists as the field's actual stored value.
Set by the Deluge function on any non-EM_104 ZeptoMail response. NOT a defined picklist value.
